title: Real Time
description: A mod that syncs your game time to IRL time, and matches the sunrise and sunset times correctly.
body:
# Real Time
A mod that syncs your game time to IRL time.

The mod uses [ipify](https://ipify.org) and [ipapi](https://ipapi.com) to get an approximate geolocation, required for getting sunrise and sunset times. It then uses [SunriseSunset.io](https://sunrisesunset.io)'s API to get your local sunrise and sunset times, allowing the mod to have an acurrate time representation in-game.

This mod is server-side only, meaning that if you run a server you don't need to get your players to install this mod. (Don't worry, **you can still use it in singleplayer**!) On servers it uses the server's approximate geolocation and system time.
